subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad, upon thee be My glory! O Afnán, upon thee be My peace! O thou who gazest toward Mine horizon, upon thee be My mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی و یا افنانی علیک سلامی یا ایها الناظر الی افقی علیک رحمتی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
